name: SPRUCE POWER HOLDING CORP
summary: Company Overview Spruce Power Holding Corporation and its subsidiaries (Spruce Power) is a leading owner and operator of distributed solar energy assets across the United States (the U.S.), offering subscription-based services to approximately 84,000 home solar assets and customer contracts, making renewable energy more accessible to everyone. We are engaged in the ownership and maintenance of home solar energy systems for homeowners in the U.S. Our primary customers are homeowners and our core ...
